description: Composition Cream and blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with short sleeves, lace on the neck, sleeves and empire waist with sequins, and has tradional print on the vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print coupled with pretty lace and sequin work is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
